recommendations.title: Birth of the Dragon
recommendations.overview: Set against the backdrop of San Francisco’s Chinatown, this cross-cultural biopic chronicles Bruce Lee’s emergence as a martial-arts superstar after his legendary secret showdown with fellow martial artist Wong Jack Man.

recommendations.title: Mourning Grave
recommendations.overview: A boy who can see ghosts moves to a small town, where he befriends a female ghost. The two work together to investigate a masked ghost who is murdering students one by one.

recommendations.title: Fist of Fury
recommendations.overview: During the Japanese occupation of Shanghai, Chen Zhen, the star pupil of a recently-deceased martial arts teacher battles a Japanese dojo which seeks the demise of his fighting school.

recommendations.title: Bloodsport
recommendations.overview: An American Army Major goes AWOL to Hong Kong for an outlawed martial arts contest called the Kumite.

recommendations.title: Bruce Lee, the Legend
recommendations.overview: The Official Golden Harvest tribute to the Master of the Martial Arts Film, Bruce Lee.

recommendations.title: Man of Tai Chi
recommendations.overview: In Beijing, a young martial artist's skill places him in position to experience opportunities and sacrifices.

recommendations.title: Ip Man
recommendations.overview: A semi-biographical account of Yip Man, the first martial arts master to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun. The film focuses on events surrounding Ip that took place in the city of Foshan between the 1930s to 1940s during the Second Sino-Jap

recommendations.title: The Legend Is Born: Ip Man
recommendations.overview: The remarkable true story of the early life of Ip Man, the formidable kung fu genius who would become Bruce Lee's mentor; beginning at the start of his journey from his initial training through to the ultimate battle to become supreme master of the a

recommendations.title: Baaghi
recommendations.overview: Ronny is a rebellious man, who falls in love with Sia but circumstances separate them. Years later, Ronny learns that Sia is abducted by a martial arts champion, Raghav.

recommendations.title: Dragon: The Bruce Lee Story
recommendations.overview: This film is a glimpse into the life, love and the unconquerable spirit of the legendary Bruce Lee. From a childhood of rigorous martial arts training, Lee realizes his dream of opening his own kung-fu school in America. Before long, he is discovered
